windowGeometry.note: Observed innerWidth was much narrower than a maximized desktop outerWidth. This usually means docked DevTools or a remote-control side panel affected capture; chromium config restores a normal maximized desktop content width while profile keeps raw observations.

inputDeviceProfile.note: Observed pointer/hover media queries were all false on a desktop profile. This commonly happens on remote or displayless hosts; chromium config normalizes to ordinary desktop input while profile keeps raw observations.

labels.finding: generate the semantic Chromium fingerprint config from the collected browser profile
labels.recommendation: produce the chromium contract with normalized capture-environment fields and privacy-safe network candidate handling

identity.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/149.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

windowGeometry.note: Observed innerWidth was much narrower than a maximized desktop outerWidth. This usually means docked DevTools or a remote-control side panel affected capture; chromium config restores a normal maximized desktop content width while profile keeps raw observations.

inputDeviceProfile.note: Observed pointer/hover media queries were all false on a desktop profile. This commonly happens on remote or displayless hosts; chromium config normalizes to ordinary desktop input while profile keeps raw observations.

observed.unmaskedRenderer: ANGLE (Intel, Intel(R) UHD Graphics 770 (0x0000A780) Direct3D11 vs_5_0 ps_5_0, D3D11)

labels.finding: capture window geometry was affected by a docked tool or remote-control panel
labels.recommendation: use normalized desktop window geometry for simulation and keep observedWindow for audit

labels.finding: remote or displayless capture polluted pointer/hover media queries
labels.recommendation: normalize pointer/hover fields to ordinary desktop values while preserving observedMediaQueries

labels.finding: raw WebGL summary extension count differed from preferred context supportedExtensions length
labels.recommendation: trust the preferred context list length and preserve the raw summary count separately

labels.finding: Chinese Windows font set contains both Simplified and Traditional signals
labels.recommendation: use mixed language font profile and rely on detected font list/hash for stronger matching

current: command-line and content-layer identity overrides can cover UA/version basics
required: native NavigatorUAData override for brands, fullVersionList, platformVersion, formFactors
single source of truth to keep UA, UA-CH, productSub, vendor, and PDF plugin state coherent

current: CPU, memory, and DNT are simple scalar overrides
required: native Navigator object/property descriptor layer for languages, maxTouchPoints, webdriver, oscpu, buildID
descriptor/toString consistency checks for all overridden Navigator accessors

current: screen size, device scale factor, and window geometry are already practical launch/runtime targets
required: native Screen/VisualViewport/media-query coherence layer
window placement and work-area handling for availWidth/availHeight/screenX/screenY
docked DevTools or remote-control panels can shrink innerWidth while outerWidth still looks maximized; keep raw observations but normalize the browser contract for ordinary desktop simulation
remote/displayless hosts can report pointer/hover media queries unlike normal desktop users; keep raw observations but simulate the normalized desktop input profile unless explicitly requested

current: timezone and Accept-Language style values are direct profile fields
required: native ICU/Intl resolvedOptions override for locale, calendar, numberingSystem, collation
supportedValues list/hash alignment across timezone, currency, unit, calendar, and collation

current: stable V8 hash seed and feature switches are feasible as startup/runtime controls
required: native API-surface gate for per-interface presence
descriptor and Function.prototype.toString consistency for gated APIs

current: Canvas readback and toDataURL hooks are feasible native/content targets
required: 2D text metrics, imageData, and WebGL canvas hashes must share one deterministic profile
avoid per-call random noise; restore a stable sampled profile

current: getParameter, extension list, and renderer/vendor overrides are high-value native targets
required: contextAttributes, shaderPrecisionFormat, supportedExtensions, and readPixels/canvas hash coherence
separate WebGL1/WebGL2/experimental-webgl profiles with descriptor-safe native binding behavior
Dawn/WebGPU adapter info, feature set, and limits need native implementation
GPU adapter must stay coherent with WebGL renderer and operating system

current: sampleRate/baseLatency/outputLatency are narrow native override targets
required: OfflineAudioContext render hash needs deterministic DSP shaping, not random noise
AudioContext, OfflineAudioContext, analyser, and destination behavior must agree

current: coarse OS/language font profiles are practical as bundled profile presets
required: native font fallback/font access layer for exact per-family availability and metrics
CSS Font Loading, canvas measureText, DOM layout, and PDF/plugin text paths must use the same font profile

current: built-in PDF plugin shape can be made coherent with brand/version
required: PluginArray/MimeTypeArray native descriptors and enumeration order
speechSynthesis voice inventory tied to OS/language profile
mediaDevices and MediaCapabilities overrides without triggering permission prompts

current: WebRTC IP handling policy is already a launch-level control
required: NetworkInformation native override for effectiveType/downlink/rtt/saveData
ICE candidate generation profile that preserves mDNS/local-IP policy coherence
QuotaManager and StorageManager estimate/persisted overrides
storage API presence and legacy webkitRequestFileSystem/openDatabase shape

current: automation-visible flags and webdriver state are high-priority scalar/native targets
required: WebAuthn capability surface and authenticator availability
Permissions API must expose shape only unless caller explicitly asks to query status
notes: permission states are intentionally not queried by this collector

required: window/global API availability gates per Chromium version, platform, and feature flags
constructor names, prototypes, property descriptors, and native-code strings must be coherent
